title: Fix firrtl backend subword assignment issue and missing wire definitions

features.name: output port part-select assignment
features.description: Code should include a part-select (slice) assignment to an output port where different bits of the output are assigned from separate statements

features.name: instance output connected to wire part-select
features.description: Code should include a module instance where the output port is connected to a part-select of a wire rather than the full wire

features.name: output port read in expression
features.description: Code should include an output port used on the right-hand side of an assignment expression (reading an output as input)

features.name: concatenation assignment feeding output port
features.description: Code should include a concatenation expression used in an assignment that targets an output port or a wire connected to an output port
